tagline: Owner-operated plumbing in Petaluma — one plumber, every job
seoDescription: Brad Roach Plumbing is an owner-operated plumber in Petaluma, CA serving Petaluma, Santa Rosa, Sonoma and Novato. Brad does every job himself — repairs, remodels and installations. Licensed under CSLB #1087922.
heroSubheading: Brad Roach Plumbing is a one-plumber shop in Petaluma — Brad does every job himself, serving Petaluma, Santa Rosa, Sonoma and Novato with repairs, remodels and installations at fair, up-front prices. Licensed under CSLB #1087922.
highlights: Owner-operated — Brad does every job himself
Serving Petaluma, Santa Rosa, Sonoma & Novato
CA contractor + Colorado Master Plumber license
aboutBody: Brad Roach Plumbing is an owner-operated plumbing business in Petaluma — Brad is the one and only plumber, so the person who answers the phone and gives the estimate is the person who does the work. He serves Petaluma, Santa Rosa, Sonoma and Novato, and customers consistently describe him as professional, easy to work with and fair on price.

Brad brings more than 25 years in the construction trades, including residential remodeling and a decade of plumbing, plus a California contractor's license, a Colorado Master Plumber's license and an engineering degree from Purdue. The business is licensed and insured under California contractor's license #1087922.

services.title: Plumbing Repairs
services.description: Leaks, fixtures, drains and everyday plumbing problems, handled directly by the owner.

services.title: Remodel Plumbing
services.description: Bath and kitchen remodel plumbing, drawing on 15 years of residential remodeling experience.

services.title: Fixture & Appliance Installation
services.description: Installation of fixtures, water heaters and plumbing appliances, done to code.

services.title: Service Across the North Bay
services.description: Plumbing service for Petaluma, Santa Rosa, Sonoma and Novato homeowners.

testimonials.quote: Brad is very professional and gave us a very reasonable price. Prices are fair and he's easy to work with — highly recommend him.
testimonials.author: Verified Yelp review · Petaluma

notes: Sources: Yelp (yelp.com/biz/brad-roach-plumbing-petaluma, 5.0 stars / 10 reviews), BBB (bbb.org Petaluma profile — A- rating, NOT accredited, file opened 2/10/2025, NO website on file), BuildZoom, BNI SF Bay.
